# Frontmatter check

This note exists to exercise the YAML frontmatter stripper. The body after the closing fence should be the only content seen by the parser, and the first sentence below this heading should survive intact so that downstream shingling and quality checks work as expected on ordinary prose.

We hedge rarely and favor short, concrete sentences. The pipeline should keep this chunk.
